text: "Honestly, the big thing for me is structure — I want headers, clear sections, something a reader can scan and navigate. I also lean heavily on code examples wherever they make sense, because showing beats telling every time. The main thing I keep in mind is audience: I write assuming the reader is a competent engineer, just not someone who's touched this particular system before, so I try not to over-explain general concepts but do explain the specifics thoroughly."
